partial_progress.details: Analysis complete - Box semantics are sound, concern is about degenerate singleton bundles not actual implementation

summary.root_cause: The concern assumes singleton Omega, but BFMCS has multiple families
summary.key_finding: Box quantifies over all histories from all families in B.families, not just one chain
summary.phi_implies_box_phi: NOT valid because different families can have different MCS at same time
